/register/ds119-z4-1919-c-2/
← The register
Call no. DS119.Z4 1919 c. 2

Auswahl historischer Stücke aus hebräischen Schriftstellern vom zweiten Jahrhundert bis auf die Gegenwart

Western European collection
Direct marking
The evidence

Each row is one thing we can point to in the book, and what corroborates it outside the book. The chain is the record.

What
OAD stamp
Where in the book
recto flyleaf, red
What it says
“Offenbach Archival Depot”
Corroborated by
OAD monthly reports (NARA / fold3) ↗
What
JCR bookplate
Where in the book
Inside the upper board
What it says
“Jewish Cultural Reconstruction, Inc.”
Corroborated by
JCR distribution to Dropsie ↗
What
Gutter source note
Where in the book
Gutter behind the title page
What it says
“2/50”
Corroborated by
Dropsie accessioning ↗
Confidence — Direct marking

A physical OAD, JCR or Nazi mark in the book ties it to the looting route.

In the catalog
in “Find”
Series
Western European collection
Former owner
not identified
Provenance research & text: Bruce Nielsen · Penn Libraries, Katz Center for Advanced Judaic StudiesUncertainty in this record is shown, not hidden.
